text:
TARDIS Setup: Part two
Now that you have installed your basic life-support systems and the console unit, you must make the subsystems required to provide power throughout your TARDIS, Otherwise your Life Support systems will be entirely useless. In order to provide your TARDIS with energy, you have three options.
1: You may power it directly using Forge Energy, simply take a source of Forge Energy and pipe it into the TARDIS Energy Port.
2: Artron Energy: You may park anywhere in the world and slowly accumulate Artron leakage from Cracks in Time. This requires you have the Dynamorphic Controller and at least one Dynamorphic Generator unit.
3: Potential Energy: You may, if you so wish, harness the power of Potential Energy. There are two ways to do this. Either A: A Weeping Angel touches you inside your TARDIS, teleporting you somewhere random, the TARDIS will harness this energy and gain anywhere between 200 - 600 PE. B: You may construct an Eye Of Harmony. This is done by visiting a Star out in space, taking a Gravity Field Manipulator, and increasing the amount of Gravity exerted on this star so that its density reaches infinity and turns into a Black Hole. You must then use the Hand Of Omega to trap the collapsing star in a Time Loop, resulting in it producing Unlimited Potential Energy. You then take a Harmonic Link and place one near the star, and one inside your TARDIS.
